No Poverty.reason: Course discusses social responsibility and sustainability, linking to Target 1.3 on social protection systems.

Quality Education.reason: Focus on understanding business ethics and sustainability aligns with Target 4.7 on promoting sustainable development.
evidence: understand and be able to identify the ethics, social responsibility, and sustainability considerations

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: Course emphasizes leadership and decision-making, relevant to Target 8.5 on decent work.

Quality Education.reason: As a university course, it provides tertiary education (Target 4.3) and develops professional knowledge and leadership skills for employment (Target 4.4).
evidence: 習得相關進階專業知識（Students will acquire and apply expertise in their respective fields.）
團隊合作與領導能力（Students will be able to work effectively in teams as well as develop leadership skills.）

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: Course focuses on '工作激勵 (Work Motivation)' and '組織領導 (Organizational Leadership)', directly supporting productive employment and decent work as per Target 8.5.
evidence: 團隊合作與領導能力（Students will be able to work effectively in teams as well as develop leadership skills.）

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: Core competency includes '創新方法、創業態度與面對變革的能力 (innovative, entrepreneurial approaches to manage change)', supporting innovation within industries (Target 9.5).
evidence: 創新方法、創業態度與面對變革的能力（Students can demonstrate innovative, entrepreneurial approaches to manage change.）

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: A case study on '第一公共運輸集團公司 (First Public Transport Group Company)' tangentially relates to sustainable transport systems (Target 11.2), though the focus is organizational.
evidence: 〈百廢待舉的第一公共運輸集團公司〉

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: A core competency is to '理解與辨別商業環境中...永續議題 (understand...sustainability considerations of business situations)', directly supporting Target 12.6 on sustainable corporate practices.
evidence: 理解與辨別商業環境中道德、社會責任與永續議題（Students will understand and be able to identify the ethics, social responsibility, and sustainability considerations of business situations.）

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: Case study '當皇權遇上官僚' implies analysis of institutional effectiveness and accountability, which relates to building effective institutions (Target 16.6) at an organizational level.
evidence: 〈當皇權遇上官僚：乾隆盛世的叫魂剪辮案〉
